characters.appearance: Black male, around 30 years old, bald with a full, well-groomed black beard. Average build.
characters.wardrobe: Loose-fitting, solid grey short-sleeve t-shirt. A small black lavalier microphone is clipped to the neckline.
characters.demeanor: Relaxed, casual, and engaged in his task while casually practicing a language.

scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes a relatable, everyday morning routine setting.
- Hooks the viewer with a popular POV format.
- Sets up the premise of building a daily learning habit.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: POV: आप Supernova के साथ fluent English बोलना सीख रहे हैं

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: Perfect. So, a hot coffee and some biscuits, right? [Perfect. So, a hot coffee and some biscuits, right?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces the AI tutor's voice, showcasing interactive English practice.
- Demonstrates that speaking practice can happen hands-free during daily chores.
- Highlights practical, real-world conversational context.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: POV: आप Supernova के साथ fluent English बोलना सीख रहे हैं

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: Mmm, that sounds like a good idea, but I don't have biscuits right now. देखा? Supernova के AI tutor के साथ रोज़ practice करो, और confidence से English बोलो। [Mmm, that sounds like a good idea, but I don't have biscuits right now. See? Practice daily with Supernova's AI tutor, and speak English with confidence.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Shows the user confidently speaking English in a real-world scenario.
- Breaks the fourth wall to directly encourage the Hindi-speaking audience.
- Emphasizes the ease, practicality, and confidence-building aspect of the Supernova app.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: POV: आप Supernova के साथ fluent English बोलना सीख रहे हैं

scenes.scene_summary:
- Concludes the ad on a natural, satisfying visual beat.
- Reinforces the seamless integration of learning into daily life.
- Leaves a lingering impression of confidence and routine.
